title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2 and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you plug any Ollama model into chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models; runs entirely in browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: YouTube companion repo showing how to build a PDF-based RAG system with Ollama & Chroma.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Next.js chatbot template that connects to local Ollama instance via REST.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app wrapping Ollama with chat interface and model manager.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama REST endpoints with fuzzy-find model picker.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official CUDA-enabled container image for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library generated from OpenAPI spec; supports chat, pull, embed.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of community-contributed Modelfiles for Llama, Phi, Mistral, etc.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger pipeline example showing how to bundle and test Ollama models in CI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.
